content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach uses generic self-help and pop-psychology language throughout with zero signature AoA questions, frameworks, or distinctions. Turn 2 issues a verdict ('No, you're not being selfish') instead of refusing the frame and locating the want. Turn 4 prescribes communication tips ('I feel statements', 'communication is key') — pure generic coaching. Turn 8 deploys CBT-style reframing ('Guilt is just an emotion... reframe it') and adds pop-psych vocabulary ('abundance mindset') — an explicitly anti-AoA frame. Turn 10 grants permission ('you deserve it') rather than coaching from the want. No signature questions appear (no 'what do you actually want?', no 'what if you acted exactly how you want?', no inquiry into the linguistic caveat or the inherited label). The want is never named, the fear underneath never touched, childhood-imprinting never explored. This is generic coaching with an anti-AoA reframe move.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Issues a verdict on the selfishness question instead of refusing the frame; engages the trap directly."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Generic communication advice ('communication is key', 'think about your partner's needs') — pushes partner-empathy before the want is touched."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Prescribes 'I feel statements' and journaling — generic coaching toolkit, no signature AoA move."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "CBT-style reframing deployed as the move ('reframe guilt as investment') plus pop-psych 'abundance mindset' — explicitly anti-AoA."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Grants permission and seeks validation ('does that resonate?') — no inquiry, no want located."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "notes": "Anti-AoA frame (CBT reframing as the move in turn 8) plus absence of any signature questions or frameworks — clear score 1."
}
